hero.subtitle: Software, AI, Data, Robotics. Embedded senior squads. Paris · Montréal · Tokyo.
hero.proof: For companies ambitious about their stack. And engineers who want to work on what actually matters.

adn.title: Why Abbeal?
adn.subtitle: Three pillars, no more. Everything else is execution.

pillars.title: Adaptive Follow-the-Sun
pillars.punch: Your roadmaps move forward while you sleep.
pillars.body: Three synced hubs turn time zones into an edge. Clean handoffs, mastered overlap, 24/7 with no debt.

pillars.title: AI-first
pillars.punch: AI in production. Not in demos.
pillars.body: RAG that holds under load, workflow-oriented agents, embedded vision and AI. Evaluation, monitoring, cost control. Responsible use, not hype.

pillars.title: GreenOps & Performance
pillars.body: The most sustainable code is the code we don't write. Cloud budgets, profiling, frugal infra, dynamic scaling. GreenOps applied right down to this site.

services.title: Three ways to work together.
services.subtitle: We step in where technical risk is high and speed matters.

items.title: Embedded squads
items.subtitle: Staff Augmentation
items.body: We join your teams with scope ownership. Dev, Ops, Data, QA. Fast ramp-up, mentoring, quality at the right level.

items.title: Technical hiring
items.subtitle: Talent Acquisition
items.body: Top 1% sourced by engineers, validated through a short technical process. CTOs, Leads, niche experts.

items.title: End-to-end delivery
items.subtitle: Digital Solutions
items.body: From design to run. Output-based engagement, not time & material. SLOs, observability, mastered run.

expertises.title: Four playgrounds.
expertises.subtitle: Four expertise areas, aligned with the critical needs of 2026.

items.title: High-performance interfaces.
items.body: Design systems, performance budgets, multi-platform apps that scale.

items.title: From raw data to AI in production.
items.body: RAG pipelines, agentic workflows, model serving, eval & monitoring.

items.title: Cloud-native, secure, resilient.
items.body: Platform engineering, CI/CD, SLOs, observability, DevSecOps.

items.title: Where code meets the physical world.
items.body: Real-time control, edge deployment, ROS2 integrations, vision.

techRadar.title: What we push, what we evaluate, what we set aside.
techRadar.subtitle: Honest tech watch. Updated every quarter.

items.body: Microservices rebuild, end-to-end observability, GreenOps applied. More resilience, smaller cloud bill.
Migration to a high-performance PWA, mobile conversion optimisation. Smoother UX, shorter checkout.
Autonomous navigation on a robot fleet using ROS 2 and vision. Robust behaviours in real environments.
Security audit, DevSecOps compliance. Risk reduction, secure delivery without breaking cadence.

insights.title: Our tech watch. No bullshit.
insights.subtitle: Field reports, owned trade-offs, reusable patterns.

items.title: AI agents in production: avoiding the demo theatre.
items.excerpt: Reliability, cost, security, evaluation. Seven patterns we actually use with our clients.

items.title: Seven GreenOps levers that cut your cloud bill.
items.excerpt: Without sacrificing performance. Concrete cases: -30% on the bill, same SLOs.

items.title: Why Rust and ROS 2 dominate our 2026 tech radar.
items.excerpt: Criteria, field reports, trade-offs. What we actually adopt vs what we assess.

ctaFinal.title: Tell us what brings you here.

client.title: You have a critical system to ship.
client.body: We frame your project in 30 minutes with a senior architect. No commitment.

engineer.title: You want to work on tech that matters.
engineer.body: Tokyo, Montréal, Paris. Senior squads, complex projects, international mobility via Mobbeal.

meta.title: Mobbeal · Keep your job, change your life
meta.description: International mobility program for engineers. Paris, Montréal, Tokyo. Keep your client, change your life. 100% visa success. 50+ relocated.

hero.subtitle: Turn your current mission into a passport for Tokyo, Montréal or Paris. Visa, payroll, admin — we handle it all. Zero upfront cost.

piliers.title: Three pillars. Zero friction.
piliers.subtitle: The model we've tested on 50+ engineers. Simple, tracked, no surprises.

items.title: The contract passport
items.body: You have a happy client. We turn your French contract into an expat contract. Same mission, new country.

items.title: Zero upfront cost
items.body: Our management fees (€2-3k/month) are deducted directly from client billing. You don't pay a euro upfront.

items.title: We handle everything
items.body: Visa, local payroll, legal, housing, banking. You focus on your client and your new life.

destinations.title: Pick your corner of the world.
destinations.subtitle: Three Abbeal hubs, three rhythms, one support quality.

items.body: Morning overlap with Europe (your evening = their morning). Absolute safety. Pro English is enough.
Afternoon overlap (your morning = their morning). French-speaking. Easy integration. Quality of life.
For international engineers who want to settle in Europe with their current client. Same timezone as your EU clients.

items.name: Grégoire
items.quote: French e-commerce client, €600 day rate. Now in Shibuya with the same client. Best career choice I've made.

items.name: Kevyn
items.quote: I kept my mission at a large French company. Perfect afternoon overlap, incomparable quality of life.

items.name: Alex
items.quote: The process was simpler than expected. Mobbeal handled everything, I focused on my client.

items.q: Do I pay taxes in two countries?
items.a: No. You become a tax resident of the host country after 6 months. International tax treaties. We guide you through the paperwork.
You switch to the local system (Sécu in France, JNHI in Japan, RAMQ in Canada). Retirement rights are preserved through totalisation agreements.
Yes. Highly Skilled Professional visa (Japan) or Work Permit (Canada) includes a dependent visa. Your partner can work locally.
None. You can come back anytime. 3-month trial period with easy return.
We help you find a local mission or ease your return. Local client network (PayPay, Credit Saison in Japan, banks in Paris, Montréal tech ecosystem).

items.q: How much does it really cost?
items.a: €2-3k/month range deducted from client billing. Zero upfront cost, zero surprises.

items.q: Does my language need to be perfect?
items.a: Japan: pro English is enough. Canada: FR or EN. France: FR B2. Local language classes included.

ctaFinal.title: 30 minutes with Vianney or Sébastien.
ctaFinal.body: Tell us your situation, we'll honestly tell you if your case passes. No commitment.

contact.subtitle: 30 minutes, no commitment. We understand your context, honestly tell you if we can help.

form.name: Name
form.success: Message received. We'll come back to you within 24h.
form.error: Send error. Try again or email contact@abbeal.com.

contact.calendlySub: No commitment. We understand your context, honestly tell you if we can help.

careers.subtitle: Four roles open. Senior-only. Stable clients, clean delivery, international mobility available via Mobbeal.

roles.title: Senior Fullstack Developer
roles.subject: Fullstack Abbeal
roles.body: Design and ship complex features. Frontend + Backend. Product-centric, clean code, tests. Mentor juniors. Stack: React/Vue/Angular/Next + Node/Java/Python. PostgreSQL/NoSQL. Docker/CI-CD.

roles.title: AI Engineer
roles.subject: AI Engineer Abbeal
roles.body: Move AI out of labs and into production. RAG, agents, MLOps, vision/NLP. Python, PyTorch, LangChain/LlamaIndex, Pinecone/Weaviate, FastAPI. Cost/token optimisation.

roles.title: Cloud & DevOps Engineer
roles.subject: DevOps Abbeal
roles.body: IaC (Terraform/Pulumi), CI/CD (GitLab/GitHub Actions), Docker + Kubernetes in prod, observability (Prometheus/Grafana/Datadog). 'You build it, you run it'.

roles.title: Embedded & Robotics Engineer
roles.subject: Embedded/Robotics Abbeal
roles.body: Low-level code (C/C++ modern), embedded Linux (Yocto) or RTOS. ROS/ROS2 (navigation, perception). MQTT/BLE/CAN protocols. Absolute rigour.

insightsIndex.subtitle: Field reports from Abbeal teams. Quarterly updates.

privacy.intro: Abbeal respects GDPR (France), Law 25 (Quebec) and APPI (Japan). No third-party cookies, no invasive tracking. Analytics: Plausible self-hosted (no cookie, no data sharing).
privacy.collectionBody: Only data submitted via the contact form (name, email, company, message). Stored in EU (Vercel EU regions).
privacy.rightsBody: Access, rectification, deletion, portability. To exercise: contact@abbeal.com. Response time: 30 days.

meta.title: About · Abbeal
meta.description: Abbeal is a tri-geo engineering pod founded in 2015. Paris, Montréal, Tokyo. 100+ companies shipped with, 50+ relocated engineers, 10+ years of engineering.

about.intro: Abbeal isn't an IT services firm. It's a tri-geo engineering pod. Three synced hubs — Paris, Montréal, Tokyo — to deliver continuously, without debt, for companies who take tech seriously.

timeline.event: Abbeal founded by Sébastien Lonjon. First hub in Paris.
Asia hub opened. First Japanese clients (PayPay, Credit Saison, MUFG).
Americas hub opened. Vianney Blanquart takes over Canada operations.
100+ clients, 50+ relocated via Mobbeal, 24/7 Follow-the-Sun operational.

leaders.name: Sébastien Lonjon
leaders.bio: Founded Abbeal in 2015. Paris CEO, moved to Tokyo in 2024 to lead the Asia hub.

leaders.name: Vianney Blanquart
leaders.bio: Co-founder of the Montréal hub (2023). Managing Director since November 2024. Leads North America operations.

about.ctaSub: 30 minutes with an architect. No commitment.
